backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a `ReportEntry` type for GPS packet tracking, with `upsertReport`, `getReport`, and `getAllReports` functions backed by an in-memory Map keyed by `unitId-weekYear`.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single feature fix: investigating and resolving CSV import failures in `CSVImportSection` where all upsert calls failed, with improved error logging and toast messages.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key changes of each component, hook, utility, and page in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, border, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the GPS Packet Tracker app, loading SheetJS via CDN for XLS/XLSX support and mounting the React app via `/src/main.tsx`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with three routes (Dashboard, DataEntry, Report) wrapped in a shared Layout, plus a Sonner Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/CSVImportSection: File import UI component that parses CSV/XLS/XLSX files, derives unit IDs exclusively from filenames, and upserts records to the backend with detailed per-record error logging and descriptive toast messages.
frontend/src/components/DataEntryForm.ts: Manual bulk data entry form with model/week selectors, a dynamic row table supporting up to 30 units, per-row validation, and upsert submission with success/error toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component rendering a sticky header with logo and navigation links, a main content area, and a footer with copyright and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/ModelSummaryCard: Displays a summary card for a specific GPS unit model showing aggregated stats (total packets, stored packets, valid GPS packets) with color-coded styling and progress bars for GPS fix rate and stored rate.
frontend/src/components/ReportFilters.ts: Renders filter controls (week navigator, model selector, unit ID selector) for the report view and provides a CSV export function that downloads filtered report entries with totals.
frontend/src/components/WeeklyReportTabl: Renders a sortable table of report entries with columns for unit ID, model, packet counts, GPS fix percentage, and stored percentage, including a totals footer row and color-coded GPS fix badges.
frontend/src/components/WeekNavigator.ts: A navigation component for stepping through ISO week labels (prev/next), displaying the current week and disabling navigation buttons when adjacent weeks are unavailable.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context backed by the DFINITY AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating GPS report entries on the ICP backend, along with ISO week label utility functions and model label/constant exports.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind, imports Inter and JetBrains Mono fonts, defines a dark navy + amber OKLCH color theme via CSS variables, and adds custom scrollbar and utility component styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page showing weekly GPS unit stats (total units, packets, GPS fix rate) with week navigation and per-model summary cards derived from all reports.
frontend/src/pages/DataEntryPage.tsx: Data entry page providing both a CSV import section and a manual entry form for submitting weekly GPS packet data.
frontend/src/pages/ReportPage.tsx: Weekly reports page with filters for model, week, and unit ID, displaying a filtered table of GPS packet report entries.
frontend/src/utils/csvParser.ts: Parses Waggle portal CSV/XLS/XLSX exports into structured rows, deriving unit IDs exclusively from filenames and extracting packet counts, GPS stats, and date metadata from file content.
frontend/src/utils/reportFilters.ts: Defines a set of known invalid unit IDs (e.g. battery/signal field values) and exports a filter function to strip entries with invalid unit IDs from report arrays.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH-based navy and amber color palettes, Inter/JetBrains Mono fonts, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, existing features, and a known issue where CSV imports fail to upsert records to the backend with a fix request flagged.
